About Me
  • 01
    Experience Across Sectors
    Communications and Influencer Marketing professional with 4+ years of experience delivering campaigns across Fast-Moving Consumer Goods, technology, healthcare, tourism, and financial services sectors.
  • 02
    Breadth of Disciplines
    My experience spans influencer marketing, community advocacy, brand social content, stakeholder engagement, and integrated communications. I have worked closely with brands, creators, agencies, media partners, and cross-functional teams to execute campaigns from planning through delivery.

    Throughout my career, I have supported product launches, always-on advocacy programs, community initiatives, and integrated marketing campaigns with a focus on audience relevance, operational excellence, and measurable business outcomes.

Mega & Integrated Campaigns

Corporate Social Responsibility & Integrated Marketing Communications Campaign 2025–2026 SABECO (Bia Saigon)
SABECO
SABECO (Bia Saigon)

"Chung Vị Tết Việt, Gắn Kết Muôn Miền"

SocialInfluencer Content Community SeedingField Delivery

Business Objective: Solidify SABECO's 150-year legacy and brand trust through a nationwide festive campaign during the competitive Tet season.

Strategy: Integrated corporate-to-consumer movement bridging large-scale offline Corporate Social Responsibility gifting (17 provinces, 10 border posts) with a national digital engagement campaign — Chung Vị Tết Việt Gắn Kết Muôn Miền (The Taste Of Belonging).

My Contribution: Coordinated multi-stakeholder integration across Social, Influencer Content, and Community Seeding pillars; led on-site field delivery and managed the fanpage community activation driving the campaign's national footprint.

Long-Term Social Advocacy & Product Launches 2023–2026 Huggies (Kimberly-Clark)
Huggies
Huggies (Kimberly-Clark)

"Mẹ Ơi Con Ổn Nha" — Naturemade Overnite & Platinum Launch

Influencer EcosystemSocial Advocacy Crisis MitigationKOC Livestream

Business Objective: Protect category Share of Voice, build defense barriers for brand credibility, and accelerate premium product line adoption (Naturemade & Black Label).

Strategy: Cultivated a multi-tiered influencer ecosystem based on long-term "Friends of the House" relationships rather than transactional bookings. Implemented an active social advocacy defense force to manage consumer sentiment during packaging transitions.

Formulated long-term influencer selection matrices and managed partnerships across 6 integrated campaigns over a 3-year span. Led crisis mitigation: deployed real-time social advocates to scan and resolve consumer confusion during the Naturemade Platinum rebranding phase. Orchestrated the 6-month "Mẹ Ơi Con Ổn Nha" campaign, driving high-conversion KOC livestream funnels and creative unboxing activations.

Community-Driven WoM Advocacy

Advocate NetworkCommunity Leadership Content DirectionSocial Listening

Business Objective: Cultivate deep scientific trust and peer recommendations within premium parenting circles to dominate digital category conversations.

Strategy: A community-driven advocacy infrastructure leveraging trusted parenting community leaders and hot moms to drive monthly educational product dialogues.
